name: BestReads MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for book discovery and reading recommendations — a Goodreads-style tool for AI agents. Enables agents to search books, get recommendations, retrieve book metadata, query reading lists, and interact with book database information to support AI-driven reading and library management workflows.
use_cases: Discovering book recommendations from reading assistant agents
Searching book databases for titles, authors, and metadata from research agents
Managing personal reading lists from productivity agents
Getting book summaries and reviews from content research agents
not_for: Goodreads integration (this is a standalone service, not official Goodreads)
Academic or professional research library management
best_when: A reader or content creator wants AI agents to discover books, manage reading lists, and retrieve book information — integrating personal library management into AI workflows.
avoid_when: You need official Goodreads/Amazon integration. This is a community tool with its own data source — verify book database coverage for your needs.

auth.notes: No authentication required for public book data queries.

pricing.notes: Free open source book discovery MCP.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on book data source rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Book data coverage depends on underlying data source — verify completeness for niche titles
Community tool — not official Goodreads or book database integration
Reading list data stored locally — not synced with external reading apps
29 stars indicates very early adoption — evaluate stability before depending on it
agent_readiness.security_notes: Book data queries. No credentials. Public reading data. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Read-only book data. No credentials. Low risk.
